title: Vihaan Glass Interiors
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform for a premium glass interiors company. Features product catalog, order management, admin dashboard, and MongoDB backend.

title: FreelanceHub Marketplace
description: A dual-sided marketplace connecting freelancers and clients. Real-time chat, order tracking, and a full admin portal.

title: DSA Storyboard Platform
description: An interactive learning platform for Data Structures & Algorithms featuring step-by-step visualisations, interview mode, and cross-platform progress tracking.

title: Surreal Coding Event Platform
description: A multi-phase coding event platform with challenge engine, admin dashboard, live leaderboards, and team authentication.

title: This Portfolio
description: A high-performance portfolio site built with Vite, GSAP, and vanilla JS. Features glassmorphic navbar, spring physics cursor, and scroll-driven animations.
